title: Monster Job Search App Reviews: User Rating Breakdown
description: Live review breakdown for Monster Job Search: 240 reviews, 1.59 of 5 mean, 9% 5-star, captured 2026-07-12.
answer_first: In this July 12, 2026 capture of 240 reviews, Monster Job Search scores 1.59 of 5 overall (App Store 1.56, Google Play 1.73). Five-star reviews number 21 (9%), against 177 one-star (74%). Snapshot 1 (2026-07-12) logs 240 reviews; future refreshes will report the rating trend. The full star-distribution table for each store is below.
facts: 1.59 of 5 is the combined average over 240 reviews as of 2026-07-12 (App Store 1.56, Google Play 1.73).
21 reviews (9% of 240) award the full 5 stars.
177 reviewers (74% of 240) gave the minimum 1 star.
By country, US leads with 240 of the reviews across 1 feed(s).
Of 207 1-2 star reviews, 13 reference updates - the largest complaint bucket by keyword count.
Dataset baseline: 240 reviews at first capture on 2026-07-12.

faq.q: Is this the app's all-time rating?
faq.a: No. The 1.59 of 5 shown here averages just the 240 reviews in the 2026-07-12 capture window. All-time store ratings pool every review ever left and change far more slowly.

By scraping the stores' public review endpoints for Monster Job Search on 2026-07-12 - no logins, no private data. The 240 collected reviews across 2 feed(s) are aggregated into the star counts shown.

faq.q: Is there a rating gap between stores?
faq.a: The current window reads App Store 1.56, Google Play 1.73, computed from 240 reviews captured 2026-07-12. Per-store sample sizes are in the table, star by star.

faq.q: Can this be reproduced for a competitor's app?
faq.a: Yes. The scraper is app-agnostic: give it any store ID and it captures the same fields that fed this 240-review breakdown, with country and date filters available.
